summary: Strict Kanban Card Structure - All 12 features verified successfully. Cards display strict 3-line layout: (1) Logo + name, (2) Status dot+label at paddingLeft:32px, (3) Optional context at paddingLeft:32px. No CTAs, timing labels, or owner tags on Kanban cards. Spacing system verified: card padding 8px, card gap 2px, column gap 16px. Column headers uppercase with fontWeight 800. Empty column shows updated copy. Priority view retains full action UI.
critical_code_review_comments: KanbanCard correctly implements strict 3-line layout with paddingLeft:32px for status/context lines
getCardContext() filter correctly blocks timing phrases: 'overdue', 'due ', 'days since', 'no response', 'no recent engagement'
Card container gap=2px correctly set in JSX
Column gap COL_GAP=16px correctly applied to board grid
Column headers use fontWeight:800, textTransform:uppercase, letterSpacing:0.04em as specified
getEmptyColCopy() returns correct shortened text for all columns
StatusIndicator displays one signal per card: red/amber/green dot + label
kb-card hover class correctly styled with separate hover behavior from pb-row
context_for_next_testing_agent: Strict Kanban card structure complete. All 12 features verified: (1) One status signal per card (red/amber/green dot+label), (2) Status and context on SEPARATE lines, (3) Strict 3-line layout with paddingLeft:32px for lines 2-3, (4) No CTA arrows, (5) No timing labels, (6) No owner tags, (7) Context filter blocks timing phrases, (8) Equal spacing: card pad 8px, card gap 2px, col gap 16px, (9) Empty column shows updated copy 'No offers yet', (10) Column headers uppercase/fontWeight 800, (11) Drag-and-drop works, (12) Cards clickable navigate to detail, (13) Priority view has full action UI. Test data: Added=3 (TEST_Dup red, Florida Atlantic amber, Creighton green), Outreach=2 (Emory red, UCLA red), Talking=1 (Florida red+context), Visit=1 (Stanford red), Offered=0.

verified_features.1_one_status_signal_per_card: PASS - Each card shows exactly one status: red 'Needs attention', amber 'Needs action', or green 'On track'
verified_features.2_separate_status_context_lines: PASS - Status on line 2, context on line 3 (separate divs)
verified_features.3_strict_3_line_layout: PASS - Line 1: Logo+name, Line 2: Status at paddingLeft:32px, Line 3: Context at paddingLeft:32px
verified_features.4_no_cta_arrows: PASS - No '→', 'Start Outreach', 'Re-engage', 'Take Action' on any Kanban card
verified_features.5_no_timing_labels: PASS - Context filter blocks 'overdue', 'due', 'days since', 'no response', 'no recent engagement'
verified_features.6_context_state_only: PASS - Context shows only state: 'Coach assigned a task', 'Ready for first contact'
verified_features.7_equal_spacing: PASS - Card padding: 8px, card gap: 2px, column gap: 16px
verified_features.8_empty_column_copy: PASS - Offered column shows 'No offers yet'
verified_features.10_drag_and_drop: PASS - 7 draggable cards, cursor: grab, all functional
verified_features.12_priority_view_full_ui: PASS - Priority view shows CTAs, arrows, timing labels, owner tags
